news.title: Dapu Launches Next-Generation 5G Timing Chip Series
news.summary: Dapu Microelectronics announces the release of its new DP5G series timing chips specifically designed for 5G base station and small cell applications.
news.content:
Dapu Microelectronics has officially launched the DP5G series, a new family of high-performance timing chips optimized for 5G telecommunications infrastructure. The series includes TCXOs, VCXOs, and clock generators that meet the stringent timing requirements of 5G NR (New Radio) systems.

Key features of the DP5G series include:

- Ultra-low phase noise (< -150 dBc/Hz at 1kHz offset)
- ±0.1ppm frequency stability over -40°C to +85°C
- Fast startup time (< 2ms)
- Low power consumption (< 10mA)
- Compact 2.0x1.6mm and 1.6x1.2mm packages
- Support for frequency ranges from 10MHz to 52MHz

The DP5G series addresses the critical timing challenges in 5G networks, including tight synchronization requirements for TDD systems and carrier aggregation. The chips are fully qualified to telecom industry standards including GR-1244 and GR-253.

Sampling is available now with production volumes scheduled for Q2 2026. LiTong Electronics, as an authorized Dapu distributor, provides technical support, evaluation kits, and supply chain services for 5G equipment manufacturers.

news.title: Dapu Timing Products Receive AEC-Q200 Automotive Certification
news.summary: Dapu's TCXO and crystal oscillator product lines achieve AEC-Q200 qualification, enabling deployment in automotive electronics applications.
news.content:
Dapu Microelectronics has announced that its automotive-grade timing product portfolio has successfully passed AEC-Q200 qualification testing, validating their reliability for use in automotive electronics applications.

The certified product families include:

- DPA-TCXO Series: Temperature-compensated oscillators with ±0.5ppm stability
- DPA-XO Series: Crystal oscillators with ±25ppm stability
- DPA-VCXO Series: Voltage-controlled oscillators for PLL applications

All products underwent rigorous testing including:

- High temperature operating life (HTOL) testing at 125°C
- Temperature cycling (-40°C to +150°C, 1000 cycles)
- Mechanical shock and vibration testing
- ESD testing (HBM and CDM)
- Moisture sensitivity level (MSL) evaluation

These certifications enable Dapu timing products to be used in critical automotive applications including ADAS systems, infotainment, telematics, and powertrain control modules. The products support the automotive industry's transition to autonomous driving and electrification with reliable timing solutions.

LiTong Electronics provides full certification documentation and PPAP support for automotive customers integrating Dapu timing products into their designs.

news.title: Dapu Partners with Leading GPS Module Manufacturer
news.summary: Strategic partnership announced between Dapu Microelectronics and a major GPS module manufacturer to integrate Dapu timing components into next-generation navigation modules.
news.content:
Dapu Microelectronics has entered into a strategic partnership with a leading global GPS module manufacturer to supply high-precision timing components for their next-generation navigation modules.

Under the agreement, Dapu will provide:

- High-stability TCXOs (±0.5ppm) for GPS reference timing
- Temperature-compensated RTC oscillators (±20ppm)
- RF SAW filters for GPS L1 band (1575.42MHz)
- Low-noise amplifiers for improved receiver sensitivity

The partnership leverages Dapu's expertise in precision timing and RF components combined with the partner's extensive experience in GPS module design and manufacturing. The integrated solutions will target applications in:

- Vehicle navigation systems
- Fleet management and telematics
- Precision agriculture
- Surveying and mapping equipment
- Wearable fitness devices

Initial products are expected to enter mass production in Q3 2026. LiTong Electronics will support this partnership by providing technical support, inventory management, and logistics services for customers integrating these GPS modules into their end products.

news.title: Dapu Expands Manufacturing Capacity with New Foundry Partnership
news.summary: Dapu Microelectronics announces partnership with a leading semiconductor foundry to significantly expand production capacity for timing and RF products.
news.content:
Dapu Microelectronics has signed a strategic manufacturing agreement with a world-class semiconductor foundry to expand production capacity and ensure supply security for its growing customer base.

The partnership includes:

- Dedicated wafer capacity allocation starting from Q2 2026
- Advanced BCD process technology for clock ICs
- RF-CMOS processes for filter and LNA products
- MEMS process capabilities for next-generation timing devices
- Multi-year supply agreement with volume commitments

This expansion addresses the increasing demand for Dapu's timing and RF products across 5G, automotive, IoT, and industrial markets. The additional capacity will support:

- 50% increase in TCXO production
- 100% increase in RF filter capacity
- New product introductions including MEMS oscillators
- Reduced lead times for standard products

The partnership also includes joint development activities for advanced timing technologies including high-frequency oscillators and ultra-low jitter clock generators.

LiTong Electronics customers will benefit from improved product availability and shorter lead times as this additional capacity comes online throughout 2026.

news.title: Dapu Introduces Ultra-Low Power Timing Solution for IoT Applications
news.summary: New DPIoT series of 32.768kHz oscillators delivers industry-leading low power consumption for battery-powered IoT devices.
news.content:
Dapu Microelectronics has launched the DPIoT series, a new family of ultra-low power 32.768kHz oscillators specifically designed for battery-powered IoT and wearable devices.

The DPIoT series features breakthrough power consumption specifications:

- Active mode: < 1.0µA (industry-leading)
- Standby mode: < 100nA
- Fast startup: < 200ms
- Excellent stability: ±20ppm over -40°C to +85°C
- Tiny 1.2x1.0mm package option

These specifications enable significant battery life extension for IoT devices that require continuous timekeeping. A typical IoT sensor node using the DPIoT oscillator can achieve 5+ years of operation on a small coin cell battery.

The series includes multiple variants optimized for different IoT applications:

- DPIoT-B: Basic version for cost-sensitive applications
- DPIoT-P: Precision version with ±10ppm stability for time-critical applications
- DPIoT-R: Rugged version with enhanced shock and vibration resistance

All variants are pin-compatible with industry-standard 32.768kHz oscillators, enabling easy migration from existing solutions.

LiTong Electronics provides evaluation kits and application support for IoT developers integrating Dapu timing solutions into their designs. Contact our technical team for power consumption analysis and battery life estimation.
